description: Babies 12 Pack Plain Turnover Top Socks Making sure your little ones have enough socks to go on with is important as it keeps them comfortable. That’s why these classic cotton rich turnover socks are a great idea to add to their sock drawer, especially as these come in a 12 Pair Value Pack! These baby socks are made from soft Cotton Rich fibres which will make sure that their feet remain super soft and comfortable throughout the day. They also include a turnover top so you can adjust the length to what keeps your baby most comfy. There’s plenty of colours to choose from, all in classic colours for boys and girls. They include: Cream, Blue, Navy, Pink and White, so you’ve got colour options for boys and girls as well as neutral colours. These socks come in 12 pairs and different 5 Colours: Cream, Blue, Navy, Pink & White. They are available in 3 sizes: 0-6 Months, 6-12 Months & 12-24 Months. They are made from 78% Cotton; 20% Polyester; 2% Elastane and are Machine Washable. Extra Product Details Babies 12 Pack TOT Socks Cotton Rich Fibres Turnover Top Soft & Comfortable Value For Money Boys & Girls Colours Neutral Colours Also Available 3 Size Options 78% Cotton; 20% Polyester; 2% Elastane Machine Washable
